svg.text: Advanced Page Controls with Tabs & Single-Choice

g.text: Floating Interaction Page UI controls provide advanced configuration options such as tabs and single-choice
windows, making it easier to configure complex interfaces. Supports adding various buttons and switches.
Triggered through Node Graphs during stage runtime. Supports player interaction.
Can trigger Server Node Graph Events when tabs or single-choice windows are opened or closed.
If the Floating Interaction Page encounters disconnection or reconnection, it will not be restored.

svg.text: II. Editing the Floating Interaction Page

g.text: Add: In the UI Control Group Editor window, add the UI Control Template - Floating Interaction Page
When enabled, choose a preset background. When disabled, the default background is used.
A container organizes UI control information structure. Each container can be treated as a separate page.
Determines which containers are initially effective when the page opens.
Click to enter the Floating Interaction Page editing interface.
Pause Game on Page Open in Single-Player Mode
If enabled, opening the page in a single-player stage will pause the game while the page is being used.
When paused, Sound Effect Assets under Environment, Creature & Enemy Sounds, Character Actions, Combat,
and Objects will also pause. However, UI Sound Effects will not pause and will continue playing.
Select one from the UI controls configured in the editing interface.
Sound Effect Asset triggered when the page is opened / closed respectively.
Each page supports configuring a set of formal variables.
If a formal variable is referenced in the Asset Library, the value
configured in the current page will be used. Ensure data types match.

svg.text: III. Floating Interaction Page Editing Interface

g.text: Functions as a new "UI Layout." Add UI controls to this page and modify their settings.
Some UI controls are exclusive to the Floating Interaction Page.
Included by default. Clicking it closes the entire Floating Interaction Page and all controls within it.
Cannot be removed from the Inherent Container.
If the Inherent Container is not enabled (no Close Button), the page can still be closed with Esc on PC or the
exit button on a controller. On mobile, the page must be closed through Node Graphs.
Custom: Assets for Default, Hover, and Pressed states can be configured freely.
Cannot be modified. Correspond to the close function on PC and controller.
Clickable | Click Area Preview | Location Offset | Dimensions (Close button cannot modify offset/dimensions)
Supports configuring a navigation hint when a button is focused with the controller joystick.
If enabled, displays hint when button is focused through controller navigation
Select a preset style for the hint display
Up/Down/Left/Right targets, X/Y offset, directional focus snap to configured target
Both styles require configuration of scroll direction: Horizontal or Vertical.
Custom: Supports adding styles to preconfigure multiple tab item styles. Each style allows Default, Hover, Pressed, and Selected states.
General settings for each tab item
Margin for top, bottom, left, right sides relative to border
Tab items auto-center as a whole
Preconfigure tab items, statically link associated items. Adjust content through Node Graphs at runtime.
Name and unique identifier for each Tab Item
Select a style configured in the Tab Style settings
Shows default display config in editing window
Triggers [When Floating Interaction Page is Triggered] event
Link formal variables to specified data or Player Custom Variables.
Add page containers, configure show/hide per tab.
Add controls to containers, configure show/hide per tab.
When hotkey is enabled, tab can be interacted with using the hotkey. Triggers configured sound effect.
When controller hotkeys are enabled, Controller Navigation cannot be triggered.
If not enabled, refer to Close Button navigation config.
Single-choice windows support only Custom Style. Styles can be added to preconfigure multiple list item styles.
Each style supports Default, Hover, Pressed, and Selected states.
General settings and spacing between items
Top, bottom, left, right margins relative to border
Shows default display in editing window
Triggers [When Floating Interaction Page is Triggered]
Same as Tab: formal variable linking, container show/hide, control show/hide.
Interacting with this single-choice window triggers the configured sound effect.
Controller Selection Behavior: Select on focus change or after pressing Confirm. Same hint/navigation config as Close Button.

svg.text: IV. Manage Floating Interaction Pages with Node Graphs

g.text: Tabs and single-choice windows are collectively referred to as [List] when referenced in Nodes or Output Parameters.
Update Floating Interaction Page List Data
When Floating Interaction Page is Triggered
Show: Opens the page at runtime. Close: Closes the page programmatically.
Update List Data: Dynamically update tab/list items. When Triggered: Server event fires on tab/list interaction.
